landmarks.name: Tree in the Rock
landmarks.spoken: Ahead beside Interstate eighty stands the Tree in the Rock, a lone limber pine growing out of solid granite, old enough that the railroad and the highway both chose to bend around it.

landmarks.name: Little America
landmarks.spoken: Billboard: Little America ahead. Cheap fuel, famous ice cream cones, a stuffed penguin, and a sign every mile reminding you it is coming. A Wyoming tradition in the middle of nowhere.
